Bash(gh pr create --title "Add project summary document" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Added comprehensive `summary.md` covering the full project context: architecture, source code breakdown, API reference, testing, configuration, design decisions, and implementation status
- Added Claude Code local settings

## Test plan
- [ ] Review summary.md for accuracy against existing project documentation
- [ ] Verify no sensitive information is included

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)")
